introHeading: The wellness and wholeness journey always begins with right relationship with self and other. Every aspect of health stems from this.
introBullets: Placeholder: you want complete wellness, not disconnected fixes.
Placeholder: you want the body, heart, and mind working together.
Placeholder: you want more vitality, clarity, and groundedness.
Placeholder: you are tired of starting over and feeling split inside.

testimonialQuote: Placeholder testimonial from current Paul content goes here.
methodHeading: Integrated Heart & Vitality: a more whole way to live.
methodBody:
We're meant to experience and enjoy our own life force and the truly amazing world we live in. And deep satisfaction, peace and joy are muscles we must train and foster...

And from this place, a deeper visceral presence with self, we create a lasting vitality in every aspect of life. 

Tools to health and wellness about, but our journey is about working together to find the right one, at the right time, specifically for you. 

Listen inside, get external reflection (from a coach like me), and then listen inside. 

This is the way :)
benefitsHeading: Live Boundless, Enjoy Yourself, Support and Help Others In Their Path To Wholeness Too
benefits: More energy and presence in daily life
A healthier relationship with the body
Greater steadiness in heart and mind
Less inner conflict and more integrity
A clearer sense of direction and purpose
Change that is embodied enough to hold
